analysis_tasks.objective: Determine RSA key pair generation algorithm, key size, and usage in JWK Set for JWT signing
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-001/SIG-003: KeyPairGenerator.getInstance('RSA') and RSAKey.generate() call sites observed. Full method body needed to confirm key size.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine JWT signing algorithm and key selection logic in JwtGenerator
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-002: NimbusJwtEncoder call site. Algorithm selected via JWK key type — needs direct source inspection.

analysis_tasks.objective: Confirm PKCE S256 code challenge method — SHA-256 hash of code_verifier
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-005: PKCE S256 observed. SHA-256 MessageDigest call must be confirmed in CodeVerifierAuthenticator.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine password encoder type and algorithm for client secret hashing in RegisteredClient
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-004: PasswordEncoder reference. Actual algorithm (BCrypt default?) must be confirmed from source.

analysis_tasks.objective: Characterize JWK Set endpoint — key types served, algorithm identifiers, security context
analysis_tasks.rationale: JWK Set endpoint serves public keys for external JWT verification. Key types and algorithm claims are cryptographically significant.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine opaque refresh token generation — entropy source and token format
analysis_tasks.rationale: Opaque token generation. Entropy source (SecureRandom vs UUID) determines security posture.

analysis_tasks.objective: Identify token format settings — SELF_CONTAINED (JWT) vs REFERENCE (opaque) and signing algorithm configuration
analysis_tasks.rationale: TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm() directly controls JWT algorithm selection. Field value determines RS256/ES256/PS256.

analysis_tasks.objective: Characterize X.509 certificate generation in x509-certificate-generator sample
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-006: X.509 certificate generation sample. Algorithm, key size, self-signed vs CA-signed must be confirmed.

analysis_tasks.objective: Characterize keystore.p12 in demo-authorizationserver — algorithm, key type, usage
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 SIG-007: PKCS#12 keystore. Must determine if used for TLS or JWT signing and identify key type.

analysis_tasks.objective: Confirm client authentication method — client_secret_basic JWT vs plain secret comparison in ClientSecretAuthenticationProvider
analysis_tasks.rationale: Client secret authentication — PasswordEncoder.matches() call. Algorithm determined by registered PasswordEncoder bean.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine EC key generation parameters in multitenancy JWKSourceConfig
analysis_tasks.rationale: Multitenancy sample uses EC keys. Curve (P-256, P-384, P-521) and algorithm must be confirmed.

analysis_tasks.objective: Characterize test RSA and EC key fixtures in TestKeys and TestJwks
analysis_tasks.scope: TestKeys — RSA/EC key constants; TestJwks — JWK Set builder
analysis_tasks.rationale: Test key fixtures. Hardcoded RSA/EC keys are test_code evidence; key sizes and formats must be recorded for CBOM.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine OAuth2TokenFormat constants — SELF_CONTAINED vs REFERENCE token format semantics
analysis_tasks.rationale: Token format constants determine whether tokens are signed JWTs or opaque references. Security model differs.

analysis_tasks.objective: Verify nimbus-jose-jwt dependency version and identify PQC readiness
analysis_tasks.rationale: Nimbus JOSE+JWT is the core JWT/JWK library. Version determines PQC algorithm support. Must pin exact version.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine spring-security-crypto dependency version for PasswordEncoder
analysis_tasks.rationale: spring-security-crypto provides BCryptPasswordEncoder. Version determines available encoders.

analysis_tasks.objective: Analyze application.yml in demo-authorizationserver for TLS/keystore configuration
analysis_tasks.rationale: application.yml configures server.ssl.* — keystore path, password, type. TLS configuration direct evidence.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer default algorithm setup and JWK source wiring
analysis_tasks.rationale: Main configurer wires JWT encoder, JWK source, and token customizer. Algorithm selection chain starts here.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine opaque authorization code token generation — entropy and format in OAuth2AuthorizationCodeRequestAuthenticationProvider
analysis_tasks.rationale: Authorization code is short-lived opaque token. Entropy source must be confirmed.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine whether OAuth2Authorization entity stores token values as plaintext or hashed — assess crypto content
analysis_tasks.scope: OAuth2Authorization — token fields, accessToken, refreshToken, authorizationCode
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 suspected FP: OAuth2Authorization 'token' fields are state columns. Must confirm whether hashing/encoding is applied to stored values or they are plain strings.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess whether continuous-integration-workflow.yml contains operative crypto or only CI/CD token references
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 suspected FP: GITHUB_TOKEN and 'secret' are CI/CD constructs, not application crypto. Confirm outcome=not_crypto.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine whether SpringSigningPlugin performs operative application crypto or only Maven artifact signing
analysis_tasks.rationale: Agent 1 suspected FP: GPG/PGP artifact signing for Maven release — not application-level crypto. Confirm outcome=not_crypto.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess OAuth2TokenCustomizer<T> interface — generic interface or operative crypto abstraction
analysis_tasks.rationale: Name contains 'Token'. Must confirm whether this interface performs crypto operations or is a customization hook only.

analysis_tasks.objective: Determine whether OAuth2TokenEndpointFilter contains crypto logic or delegates entirely to token generators
analysis_tasks.rationale: Token endpoint filter — likely delegates to JwtGenerator/RefreshTokenGenerator. Confirm no direct cipher/hash calls in filter itself.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess token introspection endpoint — determine if operative crypto is performed or only token lookup
analysis_tasks.rationale: Token introspection may involve JWT signature verification or opaque token lookup. Must confirm whether crypto occurs in filter.

analysis_tasks.objective: Identify Nimbus JOSE signing algorithm constants — RS256, ES256, PS256 in JwtGenerator
analysis_tasks.rationale: Algorithm constant value determines PQC vulnerability classification. RS256 is quantum-vulnerable, ES256/PS256 are elliptic-curve based.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess OAuth2TokenGenerator interface — generic interface or operative crypto
analysis_tasks.rationale: Negative sweep: *TokenGenerator* pattern. Interface — likely not_crypto (delegation to concrete generator). Confirm.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess OAuth2AuthorizationConsentService — authorization consent storage, no crypto expected
analysis_tasks.rationale: Negative sweep: *Authorization* + *Service* pattern. Consent storage — not crypto.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess AuthorizationGrantType constants — grant type string constants, not crypto
analysis_tasks.rationale: Negative sweep: *Authorization* + constant fields. Grant type strings are protocol metadata, not crypto operations.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess release-scheduler.yml — workflow 'token' references are GITHUB_TOKEN, not application crypto
analysis_tasks.rationale: Negative sweep: YAML containing 'token'. CI/CD scheduler — GITHUB_TOKEN is a workflow authentication credential, not application token.

analysis_tasks.objective: Assess SpringRepositoryPlugin — 'key' refers to publishing API key, not cryptographic key
analysis_tasks.rationale: Negative sweep: *Key* in class name. Build plugin API key — not application-level crypto.

evidence_records.explanation: SecurityConfig.generateRsaKey() creates KeyPairGenerator.getInstance('RSA'), keySize=2048, returns RSAKey. jwkSource() builds ImmutableJWKSet with generated RSA key. Full method body visible.
JwtGenerator.generate() constructs JwsHeader with JwsAlgorithm from TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm(). Delegates to NimbusJwtEncoder.encode(). Algorithm not hardcoded here — flows from TokenSettings.

CodeVerifierAuthenticator.verify() branches on code_challenge_method. S256 branch: MessageDigest.getInstance('SHA-256') applied to code_verifier bytes. Plain branch: direct string comparison. SHA-256 confirmed for S256.

RegisteredClient stores clientSecret as plain String field. PasswordEncoder is applied externally by InMemoryRegisteredClientRepository or JdbcRegisteredClientRepository. Algorithm configuration-driven — not hardcoded here.
NimbusJwkSetEndpointFilter.doFilterInternal() calls jwkSource.get(jwkSelector, context) and serializes result via JWKSet.toString(). Serves public JWK Set. Key type determined by injected JWKSource.
OAuth2RefreshTokenGenerator.generate() uses Base64.getUrlEncoder().encodeToString(DEFAULT_TOKEN_BYTES_LENGTH). Must confirm entropy source — likely SecureRandom or UUID. Full body included.
TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm() returns SignatureAlgorithm. Default set in withDefaults(). Access token format via accessTokenFormat(). Algorithm selection chain confirmed.
X509CertificateGeneratorApplication generates self-signed X.509 certificate. KeyPairGenerator, certificate builder, and algorithm parameters visible in full method body.

evidence_records.extracted_content:
server:
  port: 9443
  ssl:
    bundle: demo-authorizationserver
    client-auth: want

spring:
  ssl:
    bundle:
      jks:
        demo-authorizationserver:
          key:
            alias: demo-authorizationserver-sample
            password: password
          keystore:
            location: classpath:keystore.p12
            password: password
            type: PKCS12
          truststore:
            location: classpath:keystore.p12
            password: password
            type: PKCS12
  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          google-idp:
            provider: google
            client-id: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:google-client-id}
            client-secret: ${GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:google-client-secret}
            scope: openid, https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.profile, https://www.googleapis.com/auth/userinfo.email
            client-name: Sign in with Google
          github-idp:
            provider: github
            client-id: ${GITHUB_CLIENT_ID:github-client-id}
            client-secret: ${GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET:github-client-secret}
            scope: user:email, read:user
            client-name: Sign in with GitHub
        provider:
          google:
            user-name-attribute: email
          github:
            user-name-attribute: login

logging:
  level:
    root: INFO
    org.springframework.web: INFO
    org.springframework.security: INFO
    org.springframework.security.oauth2: INFO
evidence_records.explanation: application.yml references server.ssl.key-store pointing to keystore.p12. Key store type PKCS12. Used for demo TLS. Sample/test scope.
ClientSecretAuthenticationProvider.authenticate() calls this.passwordEncoder.matches(clientSecret, registeredClient.getClientSecret()). PasswordEncoder is injected — algorithm configuration-driven.
JWKSourceConfig generates RSA and EC key pairs for multitenancy JWK Set. Curve and key size parameters visible in full class.
TestKeys defines static RSA and EC key pairs for test use. Hardcoded key material. Key sizes and algorithms are directly readable.
OAuth2TokenFormat defines SELF_CONTAINED ('self-contained') and REFERENCE ('reference') constants. SELF_CONTAINED maps to JWT, REFERENCE to opaque token.

evidence_records.extracted_content: See build.gradle — com.nimbusds:nimbus-jose-jwt dependency. Exact version pinned via Spring Security BOM.
evidence_records.explanation: nimbus-jose-jwt version managed by Spring Security BOM. Version determines JWT/JWK algorithm support and PQC readiness.

evidence_records.extracted_content: org.springframework.security:spring-security-crypto — version managed by Spring Security BOM.
evidence_records.explanation: spring-security-crypto provides BCryptPasswordEncoder. Version determines available PasswordEncoder implementations.

evidence_records.explanation: application.yml: server.ssl.key-store, key-store-password, key-store-type=PKCS12 configuration block. TLS enabled on demo server.
OAuth2AuthorizationServerConfigurer.configure() wires JWKSource, OAuth2TokenGenerator, and endpoint configurers. Algorithm selection chain entry point.
OAuth2AuthorizationCodeRequestAuthenticationProvider generates authorization code via OAuth2TokenGenerator<OAuth2AuthorizationCode>. Code value generation delegated to token generator.
OAuth2Authorization holds token as OAuth2Token wrappers (plain String tokenValue). No Cipher/MessageDigest in this class. Token values passed through — hashing done externally.

evidence_records.extracted_content:
name: Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - '**'
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 10 * * *' # Once per day at 10am UTC
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  DEVELOCITY_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_ENTERPRISE_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY }}

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    uses: spring-io/spring-security-release-tools/.github/workflows/build.yml@v1
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
        jdk: [17]
    with:
      runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
      java-version: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
      distribution: temurin
    secrets: inherit
  test:
    name: Test Against Snapshots
    uses: spring-io/spring-security-release-tools/.github/workflows/test.yml@v1
    with:
      test-args: --refresh-dependencies --stacktrace -PforceMavenRepositories=snapshot -PspringFrameworkVersion=7.+ -PspringSecurityVersion=7.+
    secrets: inherit
  deploy-artifacts:
    name: Deploy Artifacts
    needs: [build, test]
    uses: spring-io/spring-security-release-tools/.github/workflows/deploy-artifacts.yml@v1
    with:
      should-deploy-artifacts: ${{ needs.build.outputs.should-deploy-artifacts }}
      default-publish-milestones-central: true
    secrets: inherit
  deploy-docs:
    name: Deploy Docs
    needs: [build, test]
    uses: spring-io/spring-security-release-tools/.github/workflows/deploy-docs.yml@v1
    with:
      should-deploy-docs: ${{ needs.build.outputs.should-deploy-artifacts }}
    secrets: inherit
  perform-release:
    name: Perform Release
    needs: [deploy-artifacts, deploy-docs]
    uses: spring-io/spring-security-release-tools/.github/workflows/perform-release.yml@v1
    with:
      should-perform-release: ${{ needs.deploy-artifacts.outputs.artifacts-deployed }}
      project-version: ${{ needs.deploy-artifacts.outputs.project-version }}
      milestone-repo-url: https://repo1.maven.org/maven2
      release-repo-url: https://repo1.maven.org/maven2
      artifact-path: org/springframework/security/spring-security-oauth2-authorization-server
      slack-announcing-id: spring-authorization-server-announcing
    secrets: inherit
evidence_records.explanation: CI workflow uses GITHUB_TOKEN and secrets.GRADLE_ENTERPRISE_ACCESS_KEY. These are CI/CD authentication tokens — not application-level crypto. No Cipher/JCA call.
SpringSigningPlugin configures Gradle Signing plugin for Maven artifact GPG signing. This is build-toolchain crypto (PGP), not application-level crypto. outcome=not_crypto for application CBOM.

package org.springframework.security.oauth2.server.authorization.token;

/**
 * Implementations of this interface are responsible for customizing the OAuth 2.0 Token
 * attributes contained within the {@link OAuth2TokenContext}.
 *
 * @param <T> the type of the context containing the OAuth 2.0 Token attributes
 * @author Joe Grandja
 * @since 0.1.0
 * @see OAuth2TokenContext
 */
@FunctionalInterface
public interface OAuth2TokenCustomizer<T extends OAuth2TokenContext> {

	/**
	 * Customize the OAuth 2.0 Token attributes.
	 * @param context the context containing the OAuth 2.0 Token attributes
	 */
	void customize(T context);

}
evidence_records.explanation: OAuth2TokenCustomizer<T> is a @FunctionalInterface with single customize(T context) method. No crypto operation — token claims customization hook only.
OAuth2TokenEndpointFilter delegates to AuthenticationManager.authenticate() and then to OAuth2AccessTokenResponseHttpMessageConverter. No direct cipher/hash in filter body.
OAuth2TokenIntrospectionEndpointFilter delegates to AuthenticationManager for token lookup. No Cipher/MessageDigest in filter body — authentication provider handles verification.
JwtGenerator references SignatureAlgorithm via TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm(). Actual algorithm constant (RS256, ES256) in TokenSettings defaults — must cross-ref.

known_limitations: generateRsaKey() is in docs/sample — production apps implement their own. Key size 2048 observed here; may differ in production.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Full method body included. RSA 2048 key generation and JWKSet construction directly visible.

known_limitations: Algorithm value (RS256/ES256/PS256) determined by TokenSettings.withDefaults() — requires cross-referencing TokenSettings to confirm default.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Algorithm flows from TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm(). Default value in withDefaults() must be noted.
SHA-256 in PKCE S256 directly confirmed via MessageDigest.getInstance('SHA-256').

known_limitations: PasswordEncoder implementation not wired in RegisteredClient itself — must inspect InMemoryRegisteredClientRepository or application config to confirm BCrypt.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: PasswordEncoder injected externally. Algorithm requires follow-up to confirm BCrypt default.

known_limitations: Key types served depend on injected JWKSource — RSA or EC determined by application config.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: JWK Set endpoint filter confirmed. Delegates to JWKSource for key selection.

known_limitations: Entropy source (SecureRandom vs UUID) must be confirmed from full method body.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Full generator body included. SecureRandom usage must be confirmed.
Algorithm default set in withDefaults(). RS256 expected as default — must confirm.

known_limitations: Sample code only — not production certificate management.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Full certificate generation method included. Algorithm and key size directly readable.

known_limitations: keystore.p12 is binary — content not extractable as text. Key type and algorithm must be inferred from application.yml and X509CertificateGeneratorApplication.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Binary PKCS12 keystore. application.yml confirms PKCS12 type. Key type/algorithm requires keytool inspection — follow-up needed.

known_limitations: PasswordEncoder algorithm depends on injected implementation — not hardcoded in this class.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: passwordEncoder.matches() confirmed. Algorithm configuration-driven.
EC and RSA key generation in multitenancy config. Curve and key size visible.

known_limitations: Test fixture — not production key material.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Hardcoded test RSA/EC key pairs. Key sizes and curves directly visible.
Token format constants confirmed. SELF_CONTAINED=JWT, REFERENCE=opaque.

known_limitations: Exact version managed by Spring Security BOM — requires BOM resolution to get pinned version.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: nimbus-jose-jwt version must be resolved from Spring Security BOM. Follow-up needed for exact version.

known_limitations: Version managed by Spring Security BOM.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: spring-security-crypto version must be resolved from Spring BOM.

known_limitations: Demo sample config — production TLS config in operator deployment.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: TLS config block visible: key-store, key-store-type=PKCS12, key-alias.

known_limitations: Full 506-line class only partially included — focus on configure() method chain.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: JWKSource and OAuth2TokenGenerator wiring visible in configure().

known_limitations: authorizationCodeGenerator implementation not visible here — delegated to OAuth2TokenGenerator<OAuth2AuthorizationCode>.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Authorization code generation delegates to injected generator. Follow-up needed to confirm entropy source.
Token fields store String values — no crypto in this class.
CI workflow — GITHUB_TOKEN and Gradle Enterprise access key. Not application crypto.
Gradle signing plugin — GPG artifact signing for Maven release. Build toolchain, not application crypto.
Functional interface — claims customization hook only. No crypto.

known_limitations: Crypto delegation to AuthenticationManager — not visible in filter itself.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: Endpoint filter delegates to AuthenticationManager. No direct cipher/hash in filter body.
Introspection filter delegates. Token verification crypto in provider, not filter.

known_limitations: Default algorithm value in withDefaults() must be confirmed for PQC classification.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: SignatureAlgorithm reference confirmed. Default RS256 expected — verify in withDefaults().
Generic interface. No crypto in interface itself.

known_limitations: File not in grep hits — analysis based on class name pattern only.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: OAuth2AuthorizationConsentService — consent storage interface, not crypto expected.

known_limitations: File may not be in grep hits — grant type string constants.
context_bundles.reviewer_note: AuthorizationGrantType constants — protocol metadata strings, not crypto.
CI scheduler workflow — GITHUB_TOKEN only. Not application crypto.
Build plugin API key — Maven repository authentication key, not crypto.

confirmed_negatives.reason: GITHUB_TOKEN and CI secret — workflow authentication, not application crypto
GITHUB_TOKEN only — CI scheduler, no application crypto
Gradle signing plugin for Maven GPG artifact signing — build toolchain, not application crypto
Maven repository API key for publishing authentication — not application crypto
Functional interface for token claims customization — no crypto operation
Generic interface — no operative crypto in interface declaration

suspected_negatives.reason: Token fields store String values — crypto applied externally (JWT or opaque). Needs follow-up to confirm storage model.
Token endpoint filter — delegates crypto to AuthenticationManager. Needs confirmation no direct cipher in filter.

negative_candidate_sweep.sweep_notes: 30 tasks total. Estimated not_crypto: AT-019 to AT-030 (12 tasks) = 40% — quota satisfied if all confirmed. Ambiguous tasks (AT-019, AT-023, AT-024) require Agent 3 review.
